import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut is_ws = false
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    when None
    end
    if is_ws
      i = i + 1
    else
      let start = i
      mut done = false
      while not done
        if i >= n
          done = true
        else
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(c)
            if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
              done = true
            else
              i = i + 1
            end
          when None
            done = true
          end
        end
      end
      let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn search(_ nums: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Int
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = nums.len()
  mut found_idx = -1
  while lo < hi
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    match nums.get(mid)
    when Some(v)
      if v == t
        found_idx = mid
        lo = hi
      else if v < t
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid
      end
    when None
      lo = hi
    end
  end
  found_idx
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line1)
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line2)
      let nums = parse_ints(line1)
      let target_str = string.trim(line2)
      match string.parse_int(target_str)
      when Some(t)
        let idx = search(nums, t)
        if idx >= 0
          print("index=#{idx}")
        else
          print("not_found")
        end
      when None
        print("not_found")
      end
    when None
      print("not_found")
    end
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
end
